UserStats.title: User Stats
UserStats.description: Stores user XP, streak, viewed and completed screens, unlocked badges, and quiz scores for gamified math learning.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the student.

lastActiveDate.description: The ISO date representing last active day.

screensViewed.description: IDs of math screen pages reviewed.

completedScreens.description: IDs of math screen pages marked completed.

quizScores.description: History of quiz results with score and count.

Quiz.title: Quiz Pool Collection
Quiz.description: Stores 20 tailored Hinglish curriculum questions generated by topic, subtopic and difficulty level.

Story.title: Delhi Math Story Adventure Collection
Story.description: Stores 20 customized Hinglish math story sequence slides based on topic/subtopic.

users/{userId}.description: Student stats indexed by parent user UID.

quizzes/{quizId}.description: Quiz questions for specific topic_subtopic_difficulty combo.

stories/{storyId}.description: Math Delhi street story slides for specific subtopic.
